annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the settings tab navigation at the top and label it "Settings tabs".
annotations.target_description: Top horizontal settings tab navigation with General, Toolkit, Plan Switching, Refunds, Skip & Pause, and Feature Manager

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the Multiple Subscriptions panel title and first options and label it "Cart rules".
annotations.target_description: Multiple Subscriptions section header and first two options at the top of the main settings panel

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the One Subscription per Customer toggle and label it "Customer limit".
annotations.target_description: One Subscription per Customer toggle row

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the blue and yellow helper notices and label it "Behavior notes".
annotations.target_description: Middle pair of helper notice boxes, one blue and one yellow, below One Subscription per Customer

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the fixed Save Settings action bar at the bottom and label it "Save changes".
annotations.target_description: Fixed bottom action bar containing Save Settings and Discard Changes buttons
